notes: Live Notion evals. Each eval has its own with-skill and baseline fixture page (runs mutate them). Fixtures live under sandbox page 3770bbe8c24b815c809dd8792268779d.

evals.name: emoji-escapes-on-update
evals.prompt: Update my Notion page 'GitHub & Security Notes' (URL: https://app.notion.com/p/{FIXTURE}). Change the intro callout/quote so it says that 2FA is now enforced for all contributors. Then add a new section at the end: a heading '🔑 API Key Rotation' with a sentence under it saying API keys are rotated every 90 days.

evals.name: table-row-native-format
evals.prompt: On my Notion page 'MCP Tools' (URL: https://app.notion.com/p/{FIXTURE}), add a new tool to the table: sentry-mcp with status 'connected'. Also update the heading so the count is correct.
evals.tests_quirk: #6 table rows become native <tr>/<td>; #3 silent multi-edit skip

evals.name: child-page-preservation
evals.prompt: Restructure the body of my Notion page 'Project Hub' (URL: https://app.notion.com/p/{FIXTURE}) into something cleaner: a short intro paragraph, then two sections — one '## Overview' and one '## Links'. Keep the existing information.
evals.tests_quirk: #4 replace_content deletes child pages unless re-included
